##NAMES=Schafarzikite
##RRUFFID=R120039
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Fe^2+^(Sb^3+^)_2_O_4_
##LOCALITY=Pernek, Slovakia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Dark red elongated prismatic crystals with good cleavage, associated with white prismatic valentinite crystals.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120039
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Fe^2+^_0.96_Si_0.02_Sb^3+^_1.99_O_4_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.615 b: 8.615 c: 5.915 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 438.96 crystal system: tetragonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
